# Slik — Multi-Framework SaaS Scaffolding CLI

Slik is an open-source CLI for generating premium boilerplates for Next.js, React, and HTML.

## Key Information
- Project Name: Slik
- Primary Stack: Next.js 15, React, HTML, Supabase, Tailwind CSS
- Command: npx create-slik@latest
- Repository: https://github.com/FaizyabHussain07/slik-engine
- Documentation: https://slik-dev.vercel.app/docs
- Themes: Bento, Frost, Mono

## Features
- Framework Agnostic Scaffolding
- Premium Handcrafted UI Themes
- Supabase Auth & Database Integration
- 60-Second Initial Deployment

## Authors
- Faizyab Hussain (@FaizyabHussain07)
